notes: NGL Energy Partners EXITED retail propane in 2022. Sold 151 retail propane locations / 316,000 customers across 22 states in NE/SE/Upper Midwest to Superior Plus Corp for $900M (Jan 2022). Total divestitures of NGL retail propane generated over $1.1B gross cash proceeds (2018 EBITDA multiple >10x). NGL still maintains a Wholesale Propane and Terminal Operations segment (Kiel McCall, SVP), but no longer operates retail propane branches. nglpropane.com now redirects to nglsupplywholesale.com (wholesale only). No retail branch location data available from NGL directly — historical retail locations are now owned by Superior Plus, DCC LPG, Alliance Energy, and others.
